Video.summary: Learn more about this infamous Robot and the family that built it. With an unforgettable design and devastating weapon, this competitor became an instant icon.
Video.title: Ultimate Collection: Hypno-Disc

Video.summary: Debuting in the Second Wars, to becoming the most successful Robot ever to take part in Robot Wars. This Robot put the squeeze on all the competition, including the House Robots.
Video.title: Ultimate Collection: Razer

Video.summary: Competitors are once again tasked with defending their land in King of the Castle, will they defend their reign or be overthrown by the house robots? An even match in the semi-finals causes the house robots to forcefully decide a winner.
Video.title: The Second Wars - Heat K

Video.summary: Dead Metal takes to the ring to stop any competitors from progressing to the stage of the competition.
Video.title: The Second Wars - Heat L

Video.summary: First of the two Semi-Finals to determine which two of the six heat winners will progress to The Second Wars Grand Finals. The house robots are showing no mercy in the gauntlet and the competitors test their accuracy in this week’s trial, Pinball.
Video.title: The Second Wars - Semi Final 1

Video.summary: The last Semi-Final, competitors will once again battle the house robots in Pinball, evade them in the gauntlet and use them to destroy other competitors in the arena.
Video.title: The Second Wars - Semi Final 2

Video.summary: The first ever Robot Wars heat begins. Six brave teams enter the arena for the first time as the four House Robots are unleashed to do what they were made for, turning competitors into twisted and scorched lumps.
Video.title: Series 1 - Heat A

Video.summary: Heat B features six contestants, all battling for a spot in the series finals. To make it through, they must prove their mettle in the Gauntlet, Trial (British Bulldog) and battle it out in the Arena.
Video.title: Series 1 - Heat B

Video.summary: Six more contestants enter the arena. This week the arena transforms into a Robot football pitch and Sergeant Bash meets his match. Which contestant will score a place in the finals?
Video.title: Series 1 - Heat C

Video.summary: Lightweight special; the six contestants this week make up for what they lack in size, with agility. Can they weave their way through the house robots in the gauntlet? Or will they knock each other off-course in this week’s trial, stock car racing?
Video.title: Series 1 - Heat D

Video.summary: Six contestants enter the arena, but how many will leave? As the robots navigate their way through this week’s trial, the Labyrinth, who knows what lies around each corner? Victory or elimination?
Video.title: Series 1 - Heat E

Video.summary: No cues necessary as six new contestants play robot snooker in this week’s trial. The victors of this heat will be joining the other winners in the Grand Final. Who will be crowned champion of Robot Wars: The First Wars?
Video.title: Series 1 - Grand Final

Video.summary: The Grand Final arrives, only the best robots have made it this far. The four remaining robots face two eliminators and a playoff. The two winners then face each other to determine who will be named champion of Robot Wars: The Second wars.
Video.title: The Second Wars - Grand Final

Video.summary: The Grudge Matches gave competitors an opportunity to come back and settle some scores. A one-off episode featuring a variety of battles; Judgement Day, Reserve Rumble, Inferno Insurrection, Ramrombit, Super Showdown and Internet Insurrection.
Video.title: The Second Wars - Grudge Matches

Video.summary: Take a look back at the phenomenal second series, relive the highs and lows of the house robots and competitors of The Second Wars.
Video.title: The Second Wars - Best Of

Video.summary: An insightful view into how Robot Wars Series 1 was created.
Video.title: The Second Wars - Making of Robot Wars

Image.alt: The Second Wars - Making of Robot Wars
The Second Wars - Making of Robot Wars
The Second Wars - Making of Robot Wars

Video.summary: Let the battle for the Third Wars crown commence. With the trials being replaced with all out combat, this series is set to be the most brutal yet.
Video.title: The Third Wars - Heat A

Video.summary: Teams from across the UK enter the arena in hopes of besting the house robots and making it to the Grand Final. The knockouts keep on coming as eight more competitors think they have what it takes to survive the Robot Wars.
Video.title: The Third Wars - Heat B

Video.summary: Eight fresh competitors ready to prove their mettle in the arena. Featuring a special event, Middleweight Melee, a single exhibition battle between five robots weighing under 45.4kg.
Video.title: The Third Wars - Heat C

Video.summary: As the knockouts continue to streamline the competition, this week’s special has separate competitors trying to knock-down objects and hit targets to score the most points in Pinball Warriors.
Video.title: The Third Wars - Heat D

Video.summary: Competitors need to hold their own in this week’s trial, King of the Castle, where they must defend a circle in centre of the arena against the unforgiving house robots. How many will survive to make it to the semi-finals?
Video.title: The Third Wars - Heat E

Video.summary: House robot, Shunt goes head-to-head with the competitors. It’s his job to remove the competitors from the ring by any means necessary in this week’s trial, Sumo. Will Shunt do the house robots proud, or will the competitors give him the slip?
Video.title: The Third Wars - Heat F

Video.summary: Even more barrels are stacked up, only to be knocked down by a competitor in another Pinball Warrior. After a one-sided fight, a unanimous decision from the judges decides the victor of this week’s heat finals.
Video.title: The Third Wars - Heat G

Video.summary: This week’s special event has legs. The Walker Battle special featured robots that do not use wheels or tracks as locomotion battling it out, do they stand a chance against the house robots?
Video.title: The Third Wars - Heat H

Video.summary: Half-way through the heats and Pinball Warrior returns to Robot Wars as another robot comes to test their aim and score against the house robots. The arena claims another robot as the knockout competitions march on.
Video.title: The Third Wars - Heat I

Video.summary: The last robot football of The Third Wars in this week’s special. A spot in the final isn’t the only thing the heat final can offer one of the competitors this week.
Video.title: The Third Wars - Heat J

Video.summary: The sixth Pinball warrior run introduces another competitor to test their skills against the targets, and the house robots. In the knockouts, the house robots are being exploited as the competitors over-crowd the CPZ zones.
Video.title: The Third Wars - Heat K

Video.summary: We see more teams from around the UK bringing in their unique, sometimes amusing, sometimes terrifying robots to battle against each other. Sergeant Bash’s flamethrower is put to good use in the knockouts.
Video.title: The Third Wars - Heat L

Video.summary: Walker Battle returns as the contestants for this week’s special prepare to put their best foot forward against the other legged robots. A competitor makes the house robots sweat in the knockouts.
Video.title: The Third Wars - Heat M

Video.summary: Pinball Warrior is back for the eighth time this series and the heats are nearing their end. One of the competitors uses its speed to great effect.
Video.title: The Third Wars - Heat N

Video.summary: The penultimate Pinball Warrior run is this week. The house robots risk their own metal to attack the competitors.
Video.title: The Third Wars - Heat O
